I am proud to be part of NBKRIST.
NBKRIST laid the foundation for my successful software career.

A knowledge hub with rich collections of books, journals, e-resources and peaceful study spaces supporting academic excellence. Well equipped library with more than 44,197 books and 267 periodicals.
Dedicated Career Development and Placement Cell providing placement support, industry internships, skill training and career guidance with top recruiters visiting campus.
Modern infrastructure, digital classrooms, laboratories, Wi-Fi campus and green surroundings designed for quality learning and continuous growth.
Sports, clubs, cultural events, NSS, NCC and leadership opportunities that shape confident all-round graduates.
